meta.title: Company
meta.description: Viziblezone was founded by veterans of mission-critical communications to close the perception gap that costs lives: the person you cannot see.

hero.title:
Born in
mission-critical
communications
hero.lede: Viziblezone was founded by engineers who spent decades building the direct-mode communication systems that emergency and defense forces trust with their lives — and asked why everyday people don't get the same protection.

story.title:
From control rooms
to city streets
paragraphs: Our founding team comes from the world of professional mission-critical communications — the systems that must keep working when everything else fails. That world has a discipline called Direct Mode Operation: devices talking straight to each other, no infrastructure in between.

We watched pedestrian casualty statistics refuse to fall despite ever-smarter vehicles, and recognized the pattern: every sensor on a vehicle shares the same blind spot — line of sight. The technology philosophy that protects soldiers and firefighters could close exactly that gap for everyone else.

Viziblezone is the result: a situational awareness platform that turns the smartphone in every pocket into a safety beacon, built on the direct, infrastructure-free principles our team has implemented for decades, and protected by multiple granted patents.

heritage.quote: Decades of DMO engineering, in every pocket
heritage.lede: The team's background spans system architecture for global mission-critical vendors, standards work, and field deployments for demanding military and public-safety customers.
bullets: System architecture for global mission-critical communication vendors
Standards-body representation in professional communications standardization
Field-proven DMO implementations for military and public-safety forces
Multiple granted patents in direct device-to-device safety

teamIntro.title: The team
teamIntro.lede: Engineers and operators with deep roots in communications, automotive and safety.

team.name: Gabi Ofir
team.bio: Former system architect at a global mission-critical communications leader, standards-body delegate and DMO expert. Multiple patents. Commercial pilot.
